title: Pipe Lagging Insulation Foam Cutter Tool, 15mm & 22mm & 28mm Set, for 45-Degree Angles and Copper Pipe Insulation (Non-3D Printing)
features: High-Strength Material: Not 3D printed, this product is integrally moulded from high-strength ABS plastic, enhancing durability and extending its lifespan.
Multi-Angle Precision Cutting: With our foam pipe wrap cutting tool, you can perform 45-degree, 180-degree, and V-shaped cuts, allowing you to handle all pipe shapes.
Multi-Size Set: We provide cutting tools in three different sizes: 15mm, 22mm, and 28mm, suitable for various pipe dimensions to meet everyday needs.
Instructions for Use: The product comes with a simple user manual and detailed video instructions, which can be viewed by scanning the code upon receiving the product.
